title: Quantum Advantage in Machine Learning
description: Explore where and how quantum computers might provide advantages for machine learning tasks. Analyze theoretical speedups, practical considerations, and current evidence.
learningObjectives: Define quantum advantage and quantum supremacy in the ML context
Analyze theoretical speedup claims for QML algorithms
Identify the caveats that limit practical quantum advantage
Evaluate evidence for and against QML advantage
Recognize problem characteristics suited for quantum speedup
